name: Welcome new hires with Jira and Microsoft Teams

parameters.message: =✅ You're booked for {{ $json.startTime }} — see you then!
=That slot is taken — here are 3 nearby openings.

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf10404-candidate`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Check Calendar Availability

### Check Calendar Availability

googleCalendar — `getAll` operation against the connected account.

Next: Slot Free?

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Slot Free?

Two-way gate on `={{ $items().length === 0 || !$json.id }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Create Calendar Event · ②→ Propose Alternative Slots

### Create Calendar Event

googleCalendar — `create` operation against the connected account.

Next: Send Confirmation (Microsoft Teams)

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Send Confirmation (Microsoft Teams)

microsoftTeams — `chatMessage` operation against the connected account.

Next: Hold Until Reminder Time

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Propose Alternative Slots

microsoftTeams — `chatMessage` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Hold Until Reminder Time

Pauses 1 hours — spacing calls to respect rate limits.

Next: Send Reminder (Microsoft Teams)

### Send Reminder (Microsoft Teams)

microsoftTeams — `chatMessage` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

# Welcome new hires with Jira and Microsoft Teams

**Pattern:** Onboarding Sequence · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Welcome new hires with Jira and Microsoft Teams. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual screening is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Check Calendar Availability → Slot Free? → Create Calendar Event → Send Confirmation (Microsoft Teams) → Hold Until Reminder Time → Send Reminder (Microsoft Teams)

## Use it for
- Teams that want to onboarding sequence without manual effort
- Anyone automating screening in human resources
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Standardizes the process every time
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Microsoft OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## ⏱ Rate limiting

Work is batched and spaced with Wait so provider quotas aren't tripped. If you hit 429s, lower the batch size or raise the wait — throughput drops, reliability rises.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your screening process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
